headlines.title: US says it struck Iranian radar sites as Iran targets American forces in Kuwait
headlines.description: Iran and the US say they have carried out fresh strikes around the Strait of Hormuz, with Kuwait condemning "repeated" Iranian attacks.

headlines.title: Satellite images suggest Iran's strikes are more precise and extensive than US acknowledged
headlines.description: Analysts told BBC Verify that Tehran's strikes were more extensive than publicly acknowledged.

headlines.title: UK wins court case over collapsed Rwanda asylum deal
headlines.description: The UK does not need to pay Rwanda after it pulled a deal between the two countries, a court has ruled.

headlines.title: France seized sanctioned Russian oil tanker with UK help, Macron says
headlines.description: A British helicopter provided support during the operation on Sunday, the UK ministry of defence says.

headlines.title: 'Don't be too kind': Maternity staff used offensive terms to refer to patients
headlines.description: BBC Panorama has seen documents and spoken to former midwives from Nottingham University Hospitals NHS Trust.

headlines.title: Former England captain and manager Kevin Keegan reveals stage four cancer diagnosis
headlines.description: Former England captain and manager Kevin Keegan reveals he has stage four cancer.

headlines.title: Girl, 13, dies in hospital after river rescue
headlines.description: Police say the girl went missing in the river close to the Yorkshire Dales village of Burnsall.

headlines.title: Former first minister calls for joint Holyrood and Westminster inquiry into Murrell crimes
headlines.description: Former first minister Jack McConnell has backed a dual probe into the former SNP chief executive.

headlines.title: Israel PM orders strikes on Beirut suburbs as Hezbollah conflict escalates
headlines.description: Benjamin Netanyahu says the Hezbollah stronghold of Dahieh will be targeted in response to attacks on Israeli civilians.

headlines.title: Six people stabbed following Arsenal victory parade
headlines.description: The Metropolitan Police said 24 people were arrested on Sunday along or near the parade route.

headlines.title: Abusive passengers could be blacklisted from all airlines under new proposal
headlines.description: The scheme would allow airlines to share information on disruptive passengers and potentially restrict their access to flights.

headlines.title: Emma Barnett: We can't ignore this disease that leaves one in 10 women like me in agony
headlines.description: Women tell the BBC presenter how endometriosis affects their lives, as she challenges ministers to take action.

headlines.title: A year of grief after Air India crash: What remains when a plane falls from the sky
headlines.description: A mother still speaks about her son who died in the crash in the present tense and a brother waits for answers.

headlines.title: Euphoria actor understands backlash to third - and final - season
headlines.description: Toby Wallace stars alongside Zendaya, Sydney Sweeney and Jacob Elordi in the teen drama.

headlines.title: Ten of the greatest World Cup kits - and what makes them so iconic
headlines.description: What are the best ever World Cup shirts and what makes them iconic? BBC Sport ranks the all-time top 10 here.

headlines.title: Beyoncé's Grammy-winning director explores his grandfather's role in Biafran war
headlines.description: Filmmaker Meji Alabi directs a landmark BBC Africa Eye documentary about Nigeria's civil war.

headlines.title: Athlete awarded £149k after boss made her travel 800 miles for a meeting he didn't attend
headlines.description: Beth Littlewood says driving from Germany for a meeting with her no-show boss was the "final straw".

headlines.title: Rosamund Pike calls out audience member for texting during show
headlines.description: 'You know who you are,' declared the actress, at the end of her West End performance in Inter Alia.

headlines.title: Wise under investigation over money laundering control concerns
headlines.description: Wise says it is working with the Brussels prosecutor's office but that "no specific findings have been shared with us to date".

headlines.title: Facebook whistle-blower sits in silence in panel discussion about her tell-all book
headlines.description: Sarah Wynn-Williams can't promote her tell-all memoir about Facebook due to ongoing court action.

headlines.title: Dua Lipa marries Callum Turner in low-key London ceremony
headlines.description: The couple, who have been together since 2024, tied the knot at Old Marylebone Town Hall in London.

headlines.title: Mountain rescue's 12-hour operation to clear 'river of rubbish' seen 3 miles away
headlines.description: Central Beacons Mountain Rescue Team said they removed over a tonne of waste from the beauty spot.

headlines.title: I leave Liverpool exactly where it belongs - Slot
headlines.description: Arne Slot says he is leaving Liverpool "exactly where it belongs: among Europe's elite" after he was sacked as head coach on Saturday.

headlines.title: Rugby league legend and broadcaster Kear dies aged 71
headlines.description: Former England and Wales rugby league coach, and renowned broadcaster, John Kear has died at the age of 71.

headlines.title: Sooryavanshi, 15, wins car at IPL awards - but cannot drive it
headlines.description: Teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi wins a car for his performances in the Indian Premier League - but the 15-year-old will have to wait three years to drive it.

headlines.title: No previous French Open champions left - who will seize chance?
